name: Custom Payload (Plugin Message)
desc: Sends a plugin channel message from server to client. Used for mod/plugin communication.
notes: Common channels: "MC|Brand" (server brand), "MC|AdvCmd" (command block update), "MC|TrList" (villager trades), "MC|RPack" (resource pack).

modules.name: BrandDetector
modules.purpose: Read server brand from "MC|Brand" channel. Detect anti-cheat plugins from custom payloads.

modules.name: ServerCrasher
modules.purpose: Read server brand from "MC|Brand" channel. Detect anti-cheat plugins from custom payloads.

modules.name: AntiCheatDetector
modules.purpose: Read server brand from "MC|Brand" channel. Detect anti-cheat plugins from custom payloads.
